characters.description: 598598 (598)ProfileSpeciesHumanHair ColorBrown (Dyed Blue)Eye ColorBrownProsthetic (Right)GenderMaleAffiliationHuman DebrisFoundlingOccupationMobile Suit PilotStatusAliveMecha & VehiclesPilotUGY-R266C Monkey RodiUGY-R267MM Monkey Crab RodiReal WorldJapanese VoicesYuko SanpeiSee all appearancesAppearancesGameMobile Suit Gundam IRON-BLOODED ORPHANS Urdr-Hunt Pilot See all appearances A boy who was originallyHuman Debris. Without any concern, he gives the number assigned to him by his owner at the time as his name. After his encounter withWistario, he formed an organization calledFoundlingwith friends who were in the same situation as him. Although they are similar ages, he recognizes Wistario, who manages theAfamfacilities with his own way of thinking, and recognizes him a rival in the Urdr-Hunt.

characters.description: 88ProfileSpeciesComputerAffiliationJunk GuildOccupationSupport SystemStatusAliveMecha & VehiclesCrewAcidaliumRe.H.O.M.E.Real WorldJapanese VoicesRikako Aikawa(Promotional video)See all appearancesAppearancesOVASEED MSV AstrayMangaGSAGSA-RGS73: ΔAGSDAGSFAGSA-PSNovelMobile Suit Gundam SEED VS AstrayMobile Suit Gundam SEED Destiny Astray RGameMobile Suit Gundam SEED: Never Ending Tomorrow8is a supporting character introduced in the mangaMobile Suit Gundam SEED Astray. Crew See all appearances 8 has the ability to pilot any mobile suit it comes upon. It argues with Lowe about how to upgrade mobile suits and often engage in friendly banter with him. Usually, 8 helps Lowe out during combat by giving suggestions on what decisions are best for him. According to itself, it has records on humanity's entire history of warfare. It communicates with people through the words displayed on its screen, and can express its feelings or mood by varying the way the words are shown. Unlike the vast majority of computers at the time, 8 is not a quantum computer, making it immune to the effects of the quantum computer virus spread by theNMS-X07PO Gel Finietoand theZGMF-X12A Testament Gundam.

characters.name: Aber Rindt
characters.description:
Aber RindtAber RindtProfileSpeciesHumanBlood-TypeABHeight179 cm5.873 ft
70.472 in
Weight59 kg130.073 lb
Hair ColorSilverEye ColorChestnutAge42Birth DateJuly 12, 2270 (A.D.)GenderMaleAffiliationA-Laws[G00-S2]ESF Forces[00F]OccupationField CommanderRankMajorStatusKilled in Action(2312)Mecha & VehiclesCaptainBering-classESF-SC01 Baikal-classReal WorldJapanese VoicesKazuki YaoEnglish VoicesAndrew TothSee all appearancesAppearancesTelevisionG00:#29-Episode #38Manga00F: #18 - Chapter #19Aber Rindt(アーバ・リント,Āba Rinto?)is a character introduced in Season 2 of the animeMobile Suit Gundam 00. See all appearances Aber is overall a shrewd military man that hides behind power to compensate for his small courage. His confidence and bravery is relative to the success rate of a mission. When he is at an advantage, he displays much bravado, carrying a narcissistic attitude, showing-off, and belittles those he feel inferior to him. However, when things go bad, he is quick to cower and expects those under his command to help him in desperate situations. He often relies on the talents of other people to help him succeed in his career, but shows no appreciation for those under his command. Being a shrewd survivalist and tactician, he always make sure to attack the enemy in overwhelming force to ensure victory; however he often underestimates his enemies. He's a poor tactician as he lacks imagination and foresight beyond the scope of his own strategies.

characters.name: Abu Dabia
characters.description: Abu DabiaAbu DabiaProfileSpeciesHumanGenderMaleAffiliationAnti Earth Union GroupOccupationMobile Suit PilotStatusAliveReal WorldSee all appearancesAppearancesTelevisionMSGZZMovieGundam the Ride: A Baoa QuAbu Dabia(アブ・ダビア,Abu Dabia?)is a fictional character fromMobile Suit Zeta Gundam,Gundam the Ride: A Baoa QuandMobile Suit Gundam ZZ. See all appearances During the One Year War, Abu, along withHenken Bekkener, were in charge of transport ship. While on a mission of transporting refugees to safety, they were caught in the first firing of Zeon'sColony Laser. Both Abu and Henken managed to survive the sudden attack.

characters.description: Adenauer ParayaAdenauer ParayaProfileSpeciesHumanGenderMaleFamilyQuess Paraya(daughter/deceased)Katherine(mistress)AffiliationEarth FederationOccupationVice Foreign MinisterStatusDeceased(March 0093)Real WorldJapanese VoicesShunsuke ShimaTakurō KitagawaEnglish VoicesTrevor DevallSee all appearancesAppearancesMovieMobile Suit Gundam: Char's CounterattackMangaMSG-CCA BC(M)NovelMobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack - Beltorchika's ChildrenAdenauer Paraya(アデナウアー・パラヤ,Adenauer Paraya?)is a fictional character fromMobile Suit Gundam: Char's Counterattack. As the Vice-Foreign Minister of theEarth Federation, he is sent to negotiate disarmament withChar Aznable'sNeo Zeon. See all appearances After Char sentFifth Lunacrashing into Lhasa, Tibet, Adenauer was dispatched to Side 1'sLondenionto negotiate the peace talks between theEarth Federationand Char'sNeo Zeonmovement. Before he could get into space, he had to rein in his rebellious daughter,Quess Paraya, whom was at the time trying to learn how to acquireNewtypepowers. After being caught by the police, Quess has a fight with Adenauer's lover, who suddenly leaves before going to the spaceport, choosing to risk the dangers of staying on Earth rather than continue to deal with Quess. Mad at this revelation, Adenauer bumpsBright Noa's family at the spaceport, only allowingHathaway Noato get aboard the shuttle using his diplomatic clout.

characters.name: Aeolia Schenberg
characters.description: Aeolia SchenbergAeolia SchenbergProfileSpeciesHumanBlood-TypeOHair ColorBrownEye ColorGreyAge257Birth Date2051 (A.D.)GenderMaleAffiliationCelestial BeingOccupationCelestial Being FounderElectrical and Mechanical EngineerQuantum PhysicistStatusDeceased(2308)Real WorldJapanese VoicesChikao Otsuka(Season 1)Tsutomu Isobe(Movie)English VoicesMichael KopsaDebutCelestial BeingSee all appearancesAppearancesTelevisionG00:#1-Episode #22MovieMobile Suit Gundam 00 The Movie -A Wakening of the Trailblazer-OVAG00SEAeolia Schenberg(イオリア・シュヘンベルグ,Ioria Shuhenberugu?)is a character that appears inMobile Suit Gundam 00. Aeolia is the founder ofCelestial Beingand creator of theGN Drivesfor the Gundams. See all appearances An academic born in 2051, known to have made significant contributions in the areas of physics and engineering; believed to be the founder of the private paramilitary organizationCelestial Being, which pursues the complete eradication of armed conflict. Of the few manuscripts of his still in print as of the beginning of the 24th century, the most notable is a 2090 dissertation describing a potential solution to the global fuel crisis — the theoretical basis of the combinedorbital elevatorand photovoltaic energy system, the construction and defense of which he foresaw to employ humanoid machines not unlikemobile suits. As the level of technology available at the time of publication was insufficiently advanced to realize the project, his views received little public attention. During this time, he went into self exile along with a close friend of his, having developed the basic theory of the GN Particles and the GN Drive, as well as constructing the supercomputer Veda and having influence in construction of the orbital elevator. Despite this, Aeolia felt that humanity was in a never ending cycle of conflict that was based on the misuse of knowledge.[1]

As the level of technology available at the time of publication was insufficiently advanced to realize the project, his views received little public attention. During this time, he went into self exile along with a close friend of his, having developed the basic theory of the GN Particles and the GN Drive, as well as constructing the supercomputer Veda and having influence in construction of the orbital elevator. Despite this, Aeolia felt that humanity was in a never ending cycle of conflict that was based on the misuse of knowledge.[1]

characters.name: Afranche Char
characters.description: Afranche CharU.C. 0203Afranche CharProfileSpeciesHumanClassificationNewtypeMemory CloneHair ColorBlondeEye ColorBlueAge19GenderMaleFamilyChar Aznable(Memory Clone)Everly Key(Wife)Gaba Su(Adoptive Father)Love InterestsEverly KeyAffiliationMetatronStatusAliveMecha & VehiclesPilotα000-0001 Gaia Gear αElecaRX-110 Refined Zorin SoulUM-190B.I GussaReal WorldJapanese VoicesEtsuo Yokobori(Radio Drama)See all appearancesAppearancesNovelGaia GearAfranche Char(アフランシ・シャア) is a character from the novel and radio drama,Gaia Gear. Pilot See all appearances [ Novel Ver. ] [ Radio Drama Ver. ] To the uninitiated, Afranche Char at a passing glance; one would assume he is a carbon-copy of his clone progenitor inChar Aznable(personality and all). However this belief, is far from the truth. Afranche Char, unlike his former's complex, cold, calculating and cynical nature, shows a great level of courage, nobility and compassion toward friend and foe alike. He has an extremely powerful desire to see the earth, his home and loved ones protected from those who would do it genuine harm. Raised by a community of villagers in seclusion from very early age. He was completely unaware of his genetic status as a memory clone up until he left his island home. Once he'd left and decided to ally himself with the forces ofMetatronagainst theMan-Hunters(MaHA); Afranche Char would see a kind of stoic and mature growth in his character that could only be compared (at an outside glance) to that of Char Aznable's greatest lifelong rival.Amuro Ray. Throughout his brief tenure as the leader of Metatron, the foes and peers of Afranche Char (being unversed in the differences between him and his forebear) all made the immediate assumption that the young man was a one-to-one replica of Char, an heir to his mantle, privileged with the memories and long-ago thoughts of an ancient hero. But, this belief is not the reality of Afranche's circumstance as a person. The implanted memories Afranche possesses, are nothing more than a curse in reality. Plagued with visions and nightmares of Char Aznable's greatest failures and losses, Afranche is burdened with the crushing weight of his forebear's mantle. Nonetheless, the young man has never given up on his passions or hopes; especially to that of his wife,Everly Key. This bravery is what allows his greatest allies to unite under his banner; not as Char's heir, but as Afranche. A good person.

characters.name: Agent Jacob
characters.description: Agent JacobAgent JacobProfileSpeciesHumanClassificationOldtypeHair ColorGreyGenderMaleAffiliationEarth FederationOccupationIntelligence AgentStatusAliveReal WorldJapanese VoicesMasashi HiroseEnglish VoicesJoe RomersaSee all appearancesAgent Jacob(部下・ジェイコブ,Buka Jeikobu?)is a character who appears inMobile Suit Gundam: The 08th MS Team – Miller's Report. See all appearances Alice Miller's subordinate. Belongs to the Intelligence Division. A man of stocky build, wearing a black suit and sunglasses. He is reprimanded by Alice for handcuffingShiro Amadawhen taking him in.
